_purpose: Korean (P3) translations for the HARDCODED Win32 .rsrc UI of G7MTClient.exe — the launcher/app-shell MENU, the version DIALOG, the new-file DIALOG, and the MFC string-table. Applied by tools/logh7_rsrc_patch.py (parse -> swap by va_off -> re-serialize the whole .rsrc). DISJOINT from the MsgDat/String.txt (in-game) CP949 pipeline.
_encoding_note: 32-bit PE RT_MENU/RT_DIALOG/RT_STRING strings are stored UTF-16LE on the wire (NOT the process ANSI code page), so these Korean strings render correctly regardless of the machine ACP. The 'cp949 한글' in the task brief means *Korean text*; the patcher serializes it as UTF-16LE because that is the Win32 resource string format.
_va_off_meaning: FILE offset of the first UTF-16 char of the string inside the EXE, AUTHORITATIVE per `python tools/logh7_rsrc_patch.py dump` (these are the patcher's slot offsets, which differ from the binary-strings-derived offsets in hardcoded-ui-ja.json for multi-fragment string-table blocks). Entries with text_ko=null are left as original.
_slot_note:
Keys are the 143 patchable slots the patcher exposes. Several string-table slots hold a 
-joined fragment group (MFC long-prompt
short-name pairs, recent-file list, doc-template registration); they are translated as the whole 
-joined string so every fragment is localized in one swap. hardcoded-ui-ja.json lists those fragments at separate (binary-strings) offsets that are NOT patcher slots.
_accel_note: (&X) mnemonic markers are preserved so Alt-key access still works. %1/%2/%s printf placeholders are preserved verbatim. Trailing spaces (e.g. '새로 만들기(&N) ') are preserved to match the original field length expectation.
_not_translated: Version/copyright (Version 1.0 / (C)2004 Bothtec,Inc.), status-bar ASCII toggles (EXT/CAP/NUM/SCRL), the Japanese IME 'ｶﾅ' toggle, and the MFC doc-template/OLE-ProgID registration string are left null (text_ko=null). Dialog font-face names are patched to Pretendard so Win32 resource dialogs do not fall back to the system Korean UI font.

strings.text_ja: このﾌﾟﾛｸﾞﾗﾑにはﾌｧｲﾙ %s が必要ですがこのｼｽﾃﾑ上に見つかりませんでした。
strings.text_ko: 이 프로그램은 파일 %s 이(가) 필요하지만 이 시스템에서 찾을 수 없습니다.

strings.text_ja: このﾌﾟﾛｸﾞﾗﾑは欠落ｴｸｽﾎﾟｰﾄ %s にﾌｧｲﾙ %s 内でﾘﾝｸされています。このｺﾝﾋﾟｭｰﾀは互換性のないﾊﾞｰｼﾞｮﾝの %s を含んでいる可能性があります。
strings.text_ko: 이 프로그램은 누락된 내보내기 %s 에 파일 %s 안에서 연결되어 있습니다. 이 컴퓨터에는 호환되지 않는 버전의 %s 이(가) 들어 있을 수 있습니다.
